miwi        2009-09-09 11:17:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-timelib     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  timelib is a short wrapper around php's internal timelib module.
  It currently only provides a few functions.
  
  WWW:    http://pypi.python.org/pypi/timelib/
  
  PR:             ports/138646
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3625    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-timelib/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/py-timelib/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/devel/py-timelib/pkg-plist (new)
